description: Style Note Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, this shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces. Product Details Round toed black shoe with synthetic overlays, perforations at the midfoot and central lace-ups Padded tongue and inner (pull loop at the collar) Rubber midsole TPU outsole with herrignbone grooves and trianguar nubs Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
